name: product-spec-builder
description: When user says they want to build a product/app/tool, or wants to add features, change requirements, adjust UI
intent: Guide the user through structured requirement discovery via Socratic Q&A — produce a rigorous Product-Spec.md that captures scope, workflows, data model, and constraints before any code is written
author: ReqForge

when: User says 'I want to build a product/app/tool'
User wants to change existing requirements/UI
User says grill me, stress-test plan, or align on a design before writing spec
User says distill / 蒸馏 / 'infer what I need' — fuzzy one-liner, wants needs inferred not asked
